nodes.context: Swedish criminal gang based in Gothenburg, involved in drug dealing, prostitution, extortion, illegal gambling.
Albanian criminal gang in Gothenburg, rival of Original Gangsters.
Supporter club of Bandidos in Sweden, involved in conflict with Original Gangsters.
Outlaw motorcycle club, X-Team was a supporter club that later became a regular Bandidos club.

edges.context: Violent conflict over profitable activities in Gothenburg, including shootings in 2000-2001, later truce.
Conflict initiated by a night club quarrel in 2002, leading to murder and series of violent events, truce in 2005.
X-Team was a supporter club of Bandidos, later upgraded to a regular Bandidos club in 2005.
